scripts.docs:check: pnpm --filter babulfish lint && pnpm --filter @babulfish/styles lint && pnpm run consumer:smoke
scripts.release:check: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm docs:check
scripts.release: pnpm run release:check && pnpm --filter @babulfish/styles publish --access public && pnpm --filter @babulfish/core publish --access public && pnpm --filter @babulfish/react publish --access public && pnpm --filter babulfish publish --access public
